### Checklist
- [ ] YAML file follows naming convention (`{type_prefix}-{pinyin-slug}.yaml`)
- [ ] Markdown prose file created alongside YAML
- [ ] `id` field matches filename
- [ ] `epoch` references a valid epoch
- [ ] Ran `worldengine validate` locally — passes
- [ ] Relations added to `world/relations/` (if applicable)
- [ ] Tags are relevant to the epoch and entity
